blended.narrative: Killington is looking at light snowfall over the next 48 hours, with 3.2 inches of light, fluffy snow expected. Snow levels around 3,045 ft. Looking ahead, 16 inches possible over the next 14 days.

daily_summary.narrative: Tomorrow: 3.0" of snow, highs of 44°F. Expect wet, heavy snow.
Saturday: 2.5" of snow, highs of 31°F. Expect variable conditions.
Wednesday: 2.1" of snow, highs of 24°F. Expect powder.
